Master Equation â€” Coherence Dynamics $$\frac{dC}{dt} = O \cdot G \cdot (1 - C) \cdot \alpha(s) - S \cdot C$$ $C$ = coherence (0 = fully decohered, 1 = fully aligned). $O$ = openness, the system’s outward-facing posture. $G$ = grace flow from the source. $S$ = sin entropy / decay pressure. $\alpha(s)$ = surrender coupling function.
Grace Flow (G) The active source term in the master equation.
The article’s claim is that recovery originates in $G$, not in the recovering person.
